hooks.command: test -f KNOWLEDGE.md && { echo '# Project memory (graphify store) — auto-loaded from KNOWLEDGE.md. Use the graphify skill (/graphify) to update it.'; echo; sed -n '1,400p' KNOWLEDGE.md; } || true

test -f DECISIONS.md && { echo '# Decision Log + RAID register — auto-loaded from DECISIONS.md. Record durable decisions, accepted concessions/waivers, and open risks/issues here in the same commit as the change.'; echo; sed -n '1,400p' DECISIONS.md; } || true

out=$(bash .claude/hooks/drift-check.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg m "$out" '{systemMessage: ("⚠ DRIFT-CHECK FAILED:\n" + $m)}'; else jq -n --arg m "$out" '{systemMessage: ("✅ " + $m)}'; fi

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit", additionalContext: "PERSISTENT RULES (every turn): (1) CAVEMAN MODE ON for chat replies — compressed, terse. EXCEPTIONS = full normal English when: writing durable artifacts (model/code/commits/docs), user asks for normal prose, or precision matters. (2) After ANY edit to reelcut/mbse or podcast-the-missing-link, run .claude/hooks/drift-check.sh and report its status line in your reply. (3) Maintain DECISIONS.md (Decision Log + RAID register): whenever a durable decision is made, a concession/waiver is accepted, or a problem/risk is found, append or update an entry in DECISIONS.md in the SAME commit. Never delete entries — change their Status. Do not re-derive past decisions; read DECISIONS.md first."}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Injecting persistent caveman + drift + decision-log rules
